ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) per capita */,
  "healthcare_quality_index" REAL /* Index representing the quality of healthcare in the country */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "jhu_id" TEXT /* JHU identifier for the country */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "update_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data has been updated */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on the date */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recovered cases */,
  "new_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of new recovered cases reported on the date */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases on the date */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations */,
  "new_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of new hospitalizations reported on the date */,
  "icu_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients in intensive care units (ICUs) */,
  "new_icu_patients" INTEGER /* Number of new ICU patients reported on the date */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Number of tests conducted per 1,000 people */,
  "positivity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, research institution) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is updated (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity verification */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the file import (e.g., pending, imported, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_assurance" (
  "qa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assurance check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being checked */,
  "qa_date" TEXT /* Date and time the quality assurance check was performed */,
  "qa_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality assurance check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "qa_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the quality assurance check */,
  "qa_performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the QA check */,
  "qa_tool_used" TEXT /* Tool or method used for the QA check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assurance_qa_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("qa_performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assurance_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_url" TEXT /* URL of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the dashboard was created */,
  "dashboard_status" TEXT /* Status of the dashboard (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the dashboard (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "visualization_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization file */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the visualization belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
